providers.name: City of Vancouver - Killarney Cmty Centre

providers.name: City of Vancouver - Kerrisdale Cmty Centre
providers.notes: Audited 2026-04-05 via ActiveNet REST API (Playwright unavailable — spawn UNKNOWN error). Session 1: added 42 programs, corrected 18 enrollment statuses. Session 2: added 64 programs (Summer Safaris Wks 1-9, themed camps, spring programs, Group Fitness). Session 3: bulk scrape added 680 programs (all active Kerrisdale programs); removed 315 adult-only programs per R23; 45 enrollment status corrections (44 Open→Full/Waitlist, 1 Completed). Final DB total: 617 Kerrisdale programs.
